title: corylopsis sinensis var. glandulifera
intro: Corylopsis sinensis var. glandulifera is a plant species belonging to the Hamamelidaceae family, commonly known as the Witch Hazel family, and is a variant of the Korean Witch Hazel plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylopsis sinensis var. glandulifera include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation and pain, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and creams, where it is valued for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties.
